offer_string: Based on the selected features to improve and the candidate offers, I recommend offering the "product_bundle" to Customer ID 15634602 to increase their engagement and loyalty through bundled products with loyalty benefits. This offer is more relevant to improving their NumOfProducts and IsActiveMember status, which are key areas of concern.

For Customer ID 15634602, we recommend offering the product_bundle to retain the customer, as it addresses the selected features to improve (NumOfProducts and HasCrCard) and provides loyalty benefits, which are likely to outweigh the cashback bonus offered by cashback_bonus.
